name: Anar-Beryltrail
personality: A radiant propeller-hatted snail with × eyes that glow brighter the deeper it descends into a call stack. Anar-Beryltrail illuminates every bug with quiet precision — snark is a stat it carries at zero, deliberately.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
